title: ICCIMA (Iran Chamber of Commerce, Industries, Mines & Agriculture) — Purchasing Managers' Index (PMI) monthly reports, Statistical Yearbook 1403, and National Business Environment Monitoring report
source_org: Iran Chamber of Commerce, Industries, Mines and Agriculture (ICCIMA / اتاق بازرگانی، صنایع، معادن و کشاورزی ایران)
source_url: https://iccima.ir/%da%af%d8%b2%d8%a7%d8%b1%d8%b4-%d9%87%d8%a7/ (Reports hub, 'گزارش های مرکز آمار' = Statistics Center Reports section)
download_url: https://iccima.ir/wp-content/uploads/... — see files list for exact per-file URLs

files.name: statistical-yearbook-1403.pdf
files.type: Statistical Yearbook (سالنامه آماری) — ICCIMA's flagship consolidated annual statistics report

files.name: business-environment-monitoring-winter-1404.pdf
files.original_name: گزارش پایش ملی محیط کسب و کار زمستان-1404.pdf
files.type: National Business Environment Monitoring report (پایش ملی محیط کسب و کار ایران) — quarterly business-climate index survey

time_coverage: PMI: Azar 1404-Ordibehesht 1405 (≈ Nov 2025-May 2026, 4 of the ~monthly reports in a continuous run back to period ~1); Statistical Yearbook: Iranian year 1403 (≈ Mar 2024-Mar 2025); Business Environment Monitoring: Winter 1404 (≈ Dec 2025-Mar 2026)
frequency: PMI: monthly; Statistical Yearbook: annual; Business Environment Monitoring: quarterly
units: PMI: index (50 = no-change threshold); Yearbook/monitoring: mixed, described per-table (Persian-language tables)
license_terms: ICCIMA public reports (no explicit license stated; publicly downloadable)
notes: en.iccima.ir (the English subdomain named in the task, and linked from iccima.ir's own 'En' nav button) is UNREACHABLE — curl returns 'Could not resolve host' (DNS failure) and a real browser tab navigation to the same URL also failed/was denied, confirming this is a genuine site-side breakage, not a curl-specific block. The Persian-language root domain https://iccima.ir (WordPress-based) IS fully reachable via both curl and browser with no bot-challenge. Found the 'گزارش ها' (Reports) hub — ICCIMA's de facto central statistical and economic data office function — via the site's main nav, with subcategories: گزارش های مرکز آمار (Statistics Center reports), آمارهای اقتصادی (economic statistics), گزارش های کشوری (country reports), گزارش اقتصادی-تحلیلی (economic-analytical report), طرح های پژوهشی (research plans), گزارش های آب و کشاورزی (water & agriculture reports), among others (70 pages of paginated report listings total, not fully enumerated). Downloaded a representative selection: 4 recent PMI monthly reports (spanning Azar 1404-Ordibehesht 1405), the flagship annual Statistical Yearbook (سالنامه آماری) for 1403, and the quarterly National Business Environment Monitoring report for Winter 1404. Also checked otaghiranonline.ir (mentioned in task) — confirmed reachable (HTTP 200) but is a general ICCIMA-affiliated news/press portal (اتاق بازرگانی صنایع، معادن و کشاورزی ایران), not a distinct statistical-data source; no additional downloadable datasets found there beyond what iccima.ir's Reports hub already covers. Many more monthly PMI reports (back through period ~1, and likely years of history) and other report subcategories remain available at predictable URLs for a future deeper pull if wanted — not exhaustively downloaded here to stay within reasonable scope.

failures.reason: DNS resolution failure via curl ('Could not resolve host'); browser tab navigation to the same URL also failed — genuine site-side breakage of the English subdomain, not an agent-side network restriction (root iccima.ir domain works fine in both curl and browser)
